shortDescription: Renovated 3-bedroom semi-detached in Wychwood with open-concept layout and finished lower level.
fullDescription: Welcome to 140 Wychwood Avenue in the vibrant Wychwood neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. All 3 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
